---
title: "Size vs. Bd modeling: Panamá preliminary results"
author: Cob Staines
date: 2025-09-29
format:
  html:
    toc: true
df-print: kable
bibliography: references.bib
csl: ecology.csl
---
# Setup

```{r}
#| eval: true
#| output: false
#| code-fold: true
#| code-summary: "Show setup code"

# setup
librarian::shelf(tidyverse,  RPostgres, DBI, RIBBiTR-BII/ribbitrrr, dbplyr, janitor, here, brms, cmdstanr, tidybayes)

```

# Data selection

## environmental
```{r}
env_agg = read_csv(here("data", "unified_env_agg.csv"))

```

## RACA
```{r}
raca_clean = read.csv(here("data", "JPSL_RACA_Swabbed_Individuals_2026-03-03.csv")) %>%
  clean_names() %>%
  filter(life_stage %in% c("A", "S", "Y", "M")) %>%
  dplyr::rename(site = site_name,
         body_mass_g = weight_g,
         site_utme = utme_site,
         site_utmn = utmn_site,
         bd_its1_copies_per_swab = bd_swab_results_its) %>%
  mutate(life_stage_simple = case_when(
    svl_mm >= 50 ~ "adult",
    svl_mm < 50 ~ "subadult",
    life_stage == "M" ~ "metamorph"),
    date = as.Date(date),
    site = tolower(gsub(" ", "_", site)),
    site_utm_zone = 11,  # verify
    population = site,
    region = "W",
    country = "usa",
    project = "RACA",
    taxon_capture = "rana_cascadae") %>%
  filter(!is.na(bd_its1_copies_per_swab))

raca_valid = raca_clean %>%
  select(taxon_capture,
         date,
         site,
         population,
         bd_its1_copies_per_swab,
         life_stage_simple,
         life_stage,
         sex,
         svl_mm,
         body_mass_g,
         region,
         country,
         project)
```

# RAMU/RASI
```{r}
## Connect to DB
dbcon = hopToDB("ribbitr", hopReg = FALSE)

# table pointers
db_bd = tbl(dbcon, Id("survey_data", "bd_qpcr_results"))
db_sample = tbl(dbcon, Id("survey_data", "sample"))
db_capture = tbl(dbcon, Id("survey_data", "capture"))
db_survey = tbl(dbcon, Id("survey_data", "survey"))
db_visit = tbl(dbcon, Id("survey_data", "visit"))
db_site = tbl(dbcon, Id("survey_data", "site"))
db_region = tbl(dbcon, Id("survey_data", "region"))
db_country = tbl(dbcon, Id("survey_data", "country"))

# preliminary data
bd_sample = db_sample %>%
  right_join(db_capture, by = "capture_id") %>%
  left_join(db_survey, by = "survey_id") %>%
  left_join(db_visit, by = "visit_id") %>%
  left_join(db_site, by = "site_id") %>%
  left_join(db_region, by = "region_id") %>%
  left_join(db_country, by = "country_id") %>%
  filter(sample_type == "bd",
         taxon_capture %in% c("rana_muscosa",
                              "rana_sierrae")) %>%
  inner_join(db_bd %>%
              filter(!is.na(bd_detected)) %>%
              group_by(sample_id) %>%
              slice_sample(n = 1) %>%
              ungroup() %>%
              select(sample_id,
                     bd_its1_copies_per_swab), by = "sample_id")

# load populations
site_year_pop = read.csv(here("data", "sn_resilience_trajectory_classification_pop_lookup_2026-02-28.csv")) %>%
  mutate(site = as.character(site))

# define life stage simple
bd_life_stage = bd_sample %>%
  filter(life_stage %in% c("adult",
                           "subadult",
                           NA) |
           tad_stage >= 44,
         !is.na(svl_mm)) %>%
  mutate(svl_mm = if_else(!is.na(tad_stage) & is.na(svl_mm), 25, svl_mm),
         life_stage_simple = case_when(
    !is.na(tad_stage) | svl_mm < 30 ~ "metamorph",
    is.na(svl_mm) ~ life_stage,
    (svl_mm >= 40) ~ "adult",
    (svl_mm < 40) ~ "subadult",
    .default = NA),
    year = year(date)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(life_stage_simple))

ranarasi_valid = bd_life_stage %>%
  filter(site %in% site_year_pop$site) %>%
  select(sample_id,
         bd_its1_copies_per_swab,
         sample_name,
         capture_id,
         taxon_capture,
         life_stage,
         tad_stage,
         life_stage_simple,
         svl_mm,
         body_mass_g,
         sex,
         date,
         year,
         site,
         site_id,
         region,
         country) %>%
  collect() %>%
  left_join(site_year_pop, by = c("site", "year")) %>%
  filter(!is.na(bd_its1_copies_per_swab)) %>%
  mutate(project = "MLRG")
```

# Combine data
```{r}
col_compare = compare_df_cols(ranarasi_valid,
                              raca_valid)

brms_data = bind_rows(ranarasi_valid,
                      raca_valid) %>%
  left_join(env_agg %>%
              select(date,
                     site,
                     precip_mm_30_day_sum,
                     temp_c_30_day_mean), by = c("site", "date")) %>%
  mutate(life_stage_simple = factor(life_stage_simple, levels = c("metamorph", "subadult", "adult")),
         bd_load_co = if_else(bd_its1_copies_per_swab < 10,
                              0,
                              bd_its1_copies_per_swab),
         bd_detected_co = bd_load_co > 0,
         bd_load_co_density = bd_load_co / svl_mm) %>%
  mutate(
    precip_mm_30_z = as.numeric(scale(precip_mm_30_day_sum, center = TRUE, scale = TRUE)),
    temp_c_30_z = as.numeric(scale(temp_c_30_day_mean, center = TRUE, scale = TRUE)),
    precip_mm_30_z2 = as.numeric(scale(precip_mm_30_day_sum ^ 2, center = TRUE, scale = TRUE)),
    temp_c_30_z2 = as.numeric(scale(temp_c_30_day_mean ^ 2, center = TRUE, scale = TRUE)))

# check for good alignment with environmental data
env_alignment_check = any(is.na(brms_data$precip_mm_30_day_sum)) | any(is.na(brms_data$temp_c_30_day_mean))

save(brms_data, file = here("size_bd_gam", "intermediates", paste0("brms_data_gam_", today(), ".RData")))

```

# Modeling
## Model setup
```{r}

load(here("size_bd_gam", "intermediates", "brms_data_gam_2026-03-25.RData")) 

set_cmdstan_path(Sys.getenv("cmd_stan_path"))
```

## Model fitting
```{r}
#| eval: false
#| code-fold: true
#| code-summary: "Show model fitting code"

# null model
null_zln <- brm(
  bd_load_co_density ~ 1,
  data = brms_data,
  family = hurdle_lognormal(),
  control = list(adapt_delta = 0.95, max_treedepth = 12),
  chains = 4,
  iter = 2000,
  warmup = 1000,
  seed = 124,
  cores = 4,
  backend = "cmdstanr"
)

null_zln <- add_criterion(null_zln, "loo")

saveRDS(null_zln, file = here("size_bd_gam/models/size_bd_gam_model_zln_null.rds"))
null_zln = readRDS(file = here("size_bd_gam/models/size_bd_gam_model_zln_null.rds"))

m1_zln <- brm(
  formula  =  bf(
    bd_load_co_density ~ s(svl_mm, by = taxon_capture) + (1 | population:taxon_capture) + (1 + precip_mm_30_z + precip_mm_30_z2 + temp_c_30_z + temp_c_30_z2 | taxon_capture),
    hu ~ s(svl_mm, by = taxon_capture) + (1 | population:taxon_capture) + (1 + precip_mm_30_z + precip_mm_30_z2 + temp_c_30_z + temp_c_30_z2 | taxon_capture),
    sigma ~ 1 + taxon_capture +  (1 | population:taxon_capture) + (1 + precip_mm_30_z + precip_mm_30_z2 + temp_c_30_z + temp_c_30_z2 | taxon_capture)
  ),
  data     = brms_data,
  family   = hurdle_lognormal(),
  control = list(adapt_delta = 0.95, max_treedepth = 12),
  chains   = 4,
  iter     = 2000,
  warmup   = 1000,
  seed     = 124,
  cores    = 4,
  backend = "cmdstanr"
)

m1_zln <- add_criterion(m1_zln, "loo")

saveRDS(m1_zln, file = here("size_bd_gam/models/size_bd_gam_model_zln_m1.rds"))
m1_zln = readRDS(file = here("size_bd_gam/models/size_bd_gam_model_zln_m1.rds"))


```

# visualize results
```{r}
library(tidybayes)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(patchwork)  # for combining plots

# Create a prediction grid over the range of svl_mm
svl_seq <- data.frame(svl_mm = seq(min(raca_clean$svl_mm), 
                                    max(raca_clean$svl_mm), 
                                    length.out = 200))

# --- Mu (log-mean of positive part) ---
pred_mu <- fitted(fit_01, 
                  newdata  = svl_seq, 
                  dpar     = "mu",
                  scale    = "response",
                  summary  = TRUE) %>% 
  as.data.frame() %>%
  bind_cols(svl_seq)

p_mu <- ggplot(pred_mu, aes(x = svl_mm)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = Q2.5, ymax = Q97.5), alpha = 0.3, fill = "steelblue") +
  geom_line(aes(y = Estimate), color = "steelblue", linewidth = 1) +
  labs(title = "Smooth effect on mu",
       x = "SVL (mm)", y = "mu (log-mean of positive values)") +
  theme_classic()

# --- Hu (hurdle / P(zero)) ---
pred_hu <- fitted(fit_01, 
                  newdata  = svl_seq, 
                  dpar     = "hu",
                  scale    = "response",
                  summary  = TRUE) %>% 
  as.data.frame() %>%
  bind_cols(svl_seq) %>%
  mutate(prevalence = 1 - plogis(Estimate),
         prevQ2.5 = 1 - plogis(Q2.5),
         prevQ97.5 = 1 - plogis(Q97.5))

p_hu <- ggplot(pred_hu, aes(x = svl_mm)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = Q2.5, ymax = Q97.5), alpha = 0.3, fill = "coral") +
  geom_line(aes(y = Estimate), color = "coral", linewidth = 1) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1), labels = scales::percent) +
  labs(title = "Smooth effect on hu",
       x = "SVL (mm)", y = "P(zero)") +
  theme_classic()

p_prev <- ggplot(pred_hu, aes(x = svl_mm)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = prevQ2.5, ymax = prevQ97.5), alpha = 0.3, fill = "coral") +
  geom_line(aes(y = prevalence), color = "coral", linewidth = 1) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1), labels = scales::percent) +
  labs(title = "Smooth effect on hu",
       x = "SVL (mm)", y = "P(zero)") +
  theme_classic()

# Combine
p_mu / p_prev


```
